bug: Dashboard export ignores current page filter — exports all courses instead of teacher/class/room subset
secondaryBug: Cell '46' anomaly: classNames.replace regex leaks raw digits when class name lacks 班 suffix

rootCause.primary: src/app/api/export/excel/route.ts applyAdjustments branch reads viewType/targetId for title only, does not filter effectiveItems
rootCause.secondary: cn.replace(/^.*?(\d+)班$/, '$1') returns original string when class name doesn't match 数字班 pattern

fix.frontendChanges: none — dashboard export button already passes semesterId/week/viewType/targetId
